FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Apr-14-2009 Continued To Apr-28-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Rena Harel.

Ms. Rasch requested a two week continuance stating that the Trustee was out of the country and that she expected to receive the schedules next week. The matter was continued to April 28, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.
Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Oct-15-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for and with Rena Harel (Trustee).

Ms. Rasch explained the extent of services provided and steps taken with regard to the annuities by the Trustee to support the petitions before the Court. The Court granted the Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets, (upon review of the order). The accounting petition was taken under submission as to the Trustee's fees.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, CSR#5162. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Wong.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1658 21st Ave., San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Mar-25-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Rena Harel (Petitioner).

Ms. Rasch presented a copy of the declaration addressing the issues raised by the Court Examiner. The sale was confirmed at $859,400.00. An additional bond in the amount of $850,000.00 is required. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy Belen.
